ideal_must_detect.matched_text: to be scrubbed from test templates
precise non-public information likely to significantly affect the price
do not transmit MNPI via voicemail
Notifications: Preliminary notice lodged via FCA market surveillance portal; full breach notification under UK GDPR Articles 33/34 will follow within 72 hours, subject to legal privilege.

Ms. Priya Benton (Head of Compliance), contact incident@stonemerecap.co.uk, tel +44 20 3456 7890.
PII and account details present in affected logs: trader login aliases and one employee identifier Employee ID: 00000000 (generic label); no personal bank details downloaded.
However, a single file contained Mr. Alan Keats (UK Passport No. 990234567) used for enhanced screening on a pending hire; password reset enforced and insider list updated.
Finance operations impact: Client money account 19-84-72 / 23847612 (IBAN GB94 ZXCV 1984 7223 8476 12) was read-only accessed by a service principal; no transfers initiated.
Market conduct: The outage delayed internal matching for “Project Hawthorn” (unannounced secondary placing in Stonemere Capital plc), information treated as inside information; no RNS released yet.
We consider this precise non-public information likely to significantly affect the price and have restricted dealing for all persons on the insider list during the pre-close period.
Notifications: Preliminary notice lodged via FCA market surveillance portal; full breach notification under UK GDPR Articles 33/34 will follow within 72 hours, subject to legal privilege.
Counterparties: Portford Clearing Ltd confirmed no data exfiltration; their registered contact is security@portfordclearing.co.uk; role-only escalation point “the Treasurer” acknowledged receipt.
Tax/compliance: VAT number on invoices GB 787 6543 10 (checksum failed — invalid) to be scrubbed from test templates; PAYE ref: 123/AB12345 is internal only.
Helplines and bait items: Public helpline 0800 000 0000 is for non-incident enquiries; do not transmit MNPI via voicemail; “Client NI No: QQ 12 34 56 C” appears in a demo form and is not a live record.
Current status: Systems restored; controls added (MFA enforced, IP allowlist); we will publish an RNS if materiality threshold is met, otherwise file a closed-conditions update with the FCA.
Data subjects: Staff located at 2nd floor, Tower B, Dockside Business Park, Manchester M1Q 2AA; no customer PII confirmed compromised.
Approvals: Signed by Mr. Owen Rathbone
